title: How to Build an AI-Citable Portfolio After Layoff
excerpt: Step-by-step guide to building a portfolio that AI recruitment systems can find, understand, and recommend.
author: Marcus Chen
body:
# How to Build an AI-Citable Portfolio After Layoff

## The AI Hiring Reality

If you've been laid off in the last 6 months, you know the job search feels different. Recruiters are using AI. Job boards are using AI. LinkedIn is using AI to recommend you (or not). And when hiring managers Google your name, the first thing they see might be what ChatGPT says about you.

## Why This Matters

Three ways AI affects your job search:

1. **LinkedIn Recruiter**: Recruiters use AI to filter 10,000 profiles down to 50 qualified candidates.
2. **Applicant Tracking Systems**: Most ATS now use AI to score resumes.
3. **Background Research**: When a hiring manager searches your name in ChatGPT, what does AI say about you?

## Step 1: Audit Your Current Visibility

Before optimizing, understand where you stand with the Career Visibility Audit.
